title: 10 best herbal creams for grey hair
description: Fennel creams helps with grey hair because of its natural ability to promote healthy hair growth and nourishment. Additionally, fennel's anti-inflammatory properties soothe the scalp, creating an ideal environment for hair to grow in its natural color.
